description_long: This is a two-story modern house with a flat roof structure featuring exposed wooden beams. The front yard is landscaped with a mix of trees, shrubs, and a stone pathway leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house opens to a fenced green lawn, partially covered by a white awning supported by columns. Large windows are symmetrically arranged on both floors, allowing ample natural light into the interior. The exterior walls are finished in white, giving the house a clean and contemporary appearance. The property is bordered by a wooden fence, providing privacy and a defined boundary.
description: A modern two-story white house with a flat roof, exposed beams, large windows, landscaped front yard, and a fenced rear lawn with a covered patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped yard with trees, and exposed roof beams.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, white awning, and the transition from the front garden to the fenced backyard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the fenced green lawn, covered patio area, and symmetrical window arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible trees, palm, and the continuation of the flat roof and fencing.
attribute_entryway_design: Central door with a stone pathway, flanked by landscaping and trees, no porch but a clean modern entry.
